task: Open /home/user/Videos/sample.mp4 in VLC and load the external subtitle file /home/user/Videos/sample.srt as a subtitle track. Configure VLC so the subtitle delay is +500 milliseconds (sub-delay in VLC's preferences), and begin playback. Save the preferences so the setting persists in ~/.config/vlc/vlcrc.

verification.description: Subtitle delay is set to 500 ms in vlcrc
